content:
# Strategy

## Goal
Formalize the relative base-change theory of Altman–Kleiman, *Compactifying
the Picard Scheme* (Adv. Math. 35, 1980), §1: the relative Ext sheaf
`H(I,F)` and its local-freeness criterion (Thm 1.3), and the **property of
exchange** for local Ext's culminating in the finiteness/flatness theorem
(Thm 1.9–1.10). These are the foundation the rest of the paper builds on.
Long arc: the paper's main representability theorems for the compactified
relative Picard functor (Pic^θ 6.3, Pic^{-θ} 6.6) and the §8 integral-curve
results — out of scope for now (see Phases).

## Phases & estimations
| Phase | Status | Iters left | LOC | Key Mathlib needs | Risks |
|-------|--------|-----------|-----|-------------------|-------|
| P1b-ii″ **1.2 `exists_acyclic_surjection` via building `j_!` (extension-by-zero) bottom-up** | ACTIVE | 3–6 | ~200–500 | **`j_!` ⊣ `j^*` + PreservesColimits BUILT WHOLE @019** (defeq route: `restrictFunctor j` defeq `pushforward φ` ⟹ `j_! := pullback φ`, adjunction = `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction`; NOT the planned Kan/sheafify). Remaining sub-bricks toward 1.2, in order: (1) **exactness** of `j_!`/`j^*` (`PreservesFiniteLimits`) — `j^*` DONE @020 (`restrictFunctor_preservesLimits`); `j_!` reduced @020 to `(extensionByZero j).PreservesMonomorphisms` (`extensionByZero_preservesFiniteLimits_of_preservesMono`); @021 closes that brick stalkwise — **the "stalks absent" wall is REFUTED**: Mathlib `AlgebraicGeometry.Modules.Sheaf` has `Scheme.Modules.toPresheaf` (X.Modules⥤TopCat.Presheaf Ab X, faithful⇒reflects monos), `restrictStalkNatIso` (stalk of j^* for open immersions), `germ_restrictStalkNatIso_*`, + abelian `TopCat.Presheaf.mono_of_stalk_mono`/`stalkFunctor_preserves_mono`; sole NEW sub-brick = off-U stalk vanishing `(j_!M)_x=0` for x∉U; (2) **derived/Ext adjunction** $\Ext^q_X(j_!M,F)\cong\Ext^q_U(M,j^*F)$ [hook found @020: `CategoryTheory.Adjunction.derived` + `Abelian.Ext.mapExactFunctor`] — specializes to $H^q(U,F)$ via `External.ext_affine_acyclic` (already an axiom); (3) **base change** $g^{*}j_!\cong j_!g^{*}$ [hooks: `SheafOfModules.pullbackComp`/`sheafificationCompPullback`/Beck-Chevalley]; (4) **coproduct surjection** $J=\coprod_U(j_U)_!(\Ox|U)\to I$. Critical path: gates 1.2 AND 1.3. NOT anchorable (1.2 is a §1 theorem) — must build | from-scratch multi-iter homological build; sub-bricks (2)–(3) are deep but Mathlib hooks now identified. The derived-functor work in (2) OVERLAPS the relExt strand (1.10), so it is double-leverage |
| P1b-i″ tensorMod associator (braiding+unitors DONE @007; conditional comparison/assoc landed @008) | PAUSED | 2–4 | ~150–400 | **`MonoidalClosed (PresheafOfModules R)`** (or stalkwise tensor-injectivity) — both absent from Mathlib | HARD REVERSAL fired @008: "`−⊗Q` preserves local injectivity" FALSE at presheaf level. Resume only to build `MonoidalClosed`; only un-gates 1.1.2 |
| P1b-ii prove 1.1.2 `H_tensor_invertible` | BLOCKED | 1–2 | ~80–150 | the paused unconditional associator (P1b-i″)+braiding+unitor; nat-iso of `homTensorFunctor`s via twist-by-`L`, `coyoneda` reflects iso | gated on the paused associator |
| P1b-ii(b) prove 1.1.3 `H_tensor` | LATER | 2–4 | ~120–250 | **right-exactness of `H` + commutes-with-⊕** (NOT just the associator) — abstract argument, infra not yet built | harder than 1.1.2; its `\uses` of assoc is loose — real route needs right-exact/colimit infra absent so far |
| P1b-iii(b)-fin 1.3 `H_locallyFree` (after 1.2) | BLOCKED | 1–2 | ~80–150 | functor `T` + `External.adjunction` (unscaffolded) + half-exact assembly; consumes 1.2 | gated on the j_! build above |
| P1b-iii(b) relExt + proper base change (exchange 1.8/1.9, then 1.3/1.10) | NEXT | 6–12 | ~300–700 | relative Ext `R^q f_* sExt`; proper base change; fibre products `X_T`. `FiberExtVanishes` realized @018 (fibre `Scheme.Hom.fiber`); `relExt`/`IsLFPAndFlatOn` still need `R^q f_*` | huge; relExt/base-change comparison map absent from Mathlib |
| P2 §2 strong quasi-projectivity & Quot^Φ finiteness | DEFERRED | — | — | Quot scheme, Hilbert scheme | Quot scheme not in Mathlib |
| P3 §3 rank-1 torsion-free sheaves on integral schemes | DEFERRED | — | — | torsion-free sheaves, pure dim 1 | depends on P2 |
| P4 §4–6 Lin Syst, Spl, representability Pic^θ/Pic^{-θ} | DEFERRED | — | — | rep'ility, P(E), Cohen–Macaulay | depends on P1–P3 |
| P5 §7–8 algebraic spaces, Artin rep, integral-curve Pic + Abel map | DEFERRED | — | — | algebraic spaces, Artin's theorem | Artin rep'ility not in Mathlib |

## Completed
| Phase | Iters (done@ · used) | LOC | Files | Key results | Reusable techniques | Pitfalls |
|-------|---------------------|-----|-------|-------------|---------------------|----------|
| dag + autoformalize (§1 scaffold) | 003 · 3 | ~300 | Basic.lean, _Basic.tex (26 nodes) | 6 `External.*` EGA/OB axioms; 9 §1 strand decls; `H`/`h` defs; full faithful blueprint w/ verbatim quotes | zero-object `Nonempty`+`noncomputable opaque` to declare module-cat placeholders | opaque stubs have no constructor ⇒ conclusions unprovable until real defs |
| P1a corepresentability one-liners | 004 · 1 | ~6 | Basic.lean | `h`, `H_represents` closed (corepr API); `ext_finite_flat` openness conjunct | `coreprx`/`coreprW`/`coreprX` off `IsCorepresentable` from `External.H_existence` | `private` did NOT drop helpers from leandag `unmatched` (cosmetic only) |
| P1b-i foundational defs real | 005 · 1 | ~40 | Basic.lean | `IsLFP`,`IsFreeMod`,`IsSFlat`,`tensorMod`,`IsInvertibleMod` all real, axiom-clean | `X.Modules≡SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf` defeq; tensor=`tensorObj`+sheafify; stalk-flat needs explicit `(R:=X.presheaf)(M:=M.val)` letI | `CommRingCat` stalk-module instance does NOT auto-synthesize |
| P1b-i′ `tensorBaseChangeFunctor` real | 006 · 1 | ~30 | Basic.lean | `tensorBaseChangeFunctor`=`pullback f ⋙ tensorLeft F`; new `tensorLeft` endofunctor; removed `instNonemptyModulesFunctor` | hand-built functor from `tensorObj/tensorHom`+sheafify; close laws via `congrArg G.map h |>.trans (G.map_id/_comp)` | `⋙`-composing across sheafify boundary breaks `IsLocallyInjective` TC synth; `rw` via `id_val/comp_val` fails (X.Modules≠SheafOfModules instance syntactically) |
| P1b-iii(a) realize 5 tractable opaque §1 Props | 011 · 3 (010–011; 009 died API500) | ~80 | Basic.lean | `IsRetrocompact`,`IsLocallyFreeOfFiniteRankOn`,`IsHalfExact` (@010); `extGroup`,`sheafCohomology` (@011) — all opaque→def, axiom-clean | `extGroup` via relax sig `Ab.{u}`→`Ab.{u+1}` + `letI HasDerivedCategory.standard`+`hasExt_of_hasDerivedCategory`+`AddCommGrpCat.of(Abelian.Ext)`; `IsHalfExact` via instance-implicit `∀[T.Additive]` | `inferInstance HasExt` times out (HasSmallLocalizedHom)→use explicit letI; `IsGrothendieckAbelian(SheafOfModules R)` brick AVOIDED via universe relax; `AddCommGrpCat.of` not `AddCommGrp.of` |
| P1b-ii′ affine bridge + **1.4** `exists_free_resolution_step` (first §1 deep-theorem closure) | 017 · 6 (012–017) | ~120 | Basic.lean, _Basic.tex | tilde bridge `tilde_free/_exact/_isFP`+`fp_sheaf_affine_tilde` (@012–015); 1.4 assembled @016, closed @017 (sorry 7→5, `#print axioms`=no sorryAx). 6 `External.*` anchors (affine_fp_tilde, tilde_isFP, descent_noetherian, flat_pullback_exact, pullback_isFreeMod/isLFP) | anchor-and-close: transcribe the paper's EGA/Stacks-cited inputs as `External.*`, assemble; `ShortComplex.exact_kernel` for module SES; ascribe `(tilde M : (Spec R).Modules)` to dodge universe mismatch | from-scratch Mathlib builds (ess-surj, structure-sheaf pullback `p*𝒪≅𝒪`, fp-globalization) all ended ANCHORED after multi-iter attempts — don't retry; anchor cited inputs instead |
| P1b-iii(b)-prep realize `FiberExtVanishes` (strand-(b) def layer) | 018 · 1 | ~6 | Basic.lean | `FiberExtVanishes` opaque→real `def` `IsZero (extGroup q (j^*I) (j^*F))` on the scheme fibre, axiom-clean | Mathlib `Scheme.Hom.fiber`/`fiberι` (fibre+inclusion) + `Scheme.Modules.pullback` + `extGroup`; `(s:S)` auto-coerces to `↥S` point for `f.fiberι s` | `relExt`/`IsLFPAndFlatOn` stay opaque — need internal $\sExt$-sheaf (no `internalHom` for SheafOfModules; overlaps PAUSED monoidal) **and** $R^q f_*$ (uninstantiated); both confirmed absent |

## Routes
Single route for P1: transcribe §1 of the paper bottom-up. The EGA-level
inputs the paper cites (existence of `H` for proper maps [EGA III 7.7.8],
adjunction, Ext-and-limits, descent to Noetherian) are recorded as external
dependency anchors — `\mathlibok` where Mathlib genuinely has the result,
otherwise an explicit `\textit{Source: [EGA ...]}` anchor with a cite-and-done
proof note so the §1 cone has finite effort. Whether to later *build* the
absent EGA infrastructure in Lean vs. assume it is a P2+ strategic question.

**Anchor-realization mechanism (how external anchors become Lean).** Each
`...External.*` anchor will be realized in Lean as an `axiom` (or a `sorry`-ed
declaration) carrying the exact EGA/OB statement, never silently. The loop must:
(i) keep each anchor a faithful transcription of the cited result; (ii) certify
that **no anchor is logically equivalent to, or a restatement of, a claimed §1
theorem** — the anchors are genuine EGA/OB inputs (existence of `H`, affine
acyclicity, descent, adjunction, the [OB] homological lemmas, EGA IV₃ 12.3.4
openness, EGA III₂ 12.3.3 coherence), not disguised copies of 1.3/1.9/1.10.
Consequence: the §1 theorems are proved **relative to these EGA/OB axioms**; this
is intentional for Phase 1 and is the honest analogue of the paper citing EGA.

## Open key strategic questions
- Does Mathlib have relative Ext sheaves `Ext^q_{X/S}(I,F)` and proper base
  change at the level §1 needs? (Likely no — coordinates needed.)
- Should the EGA foundational inputs be axiomatized or built? (Defer; P1 cites.)
- **Affine equivalence ess-surj: build or anchor? — RESOLVED @015 = ANCHOR** (`External.affine_fp_tilde`,
  Stacks 01IA+01PC). Pre-committed iter-014 reversal fired (3-iter build attempt confirmed it a
  from-scratch multi-iter Mathlib layer). Buildable later / upstreamable — kept as a Mathlib gap.
- **`relExt`/1.10 2nd conjunct: anchor or build? — RESOLVED @019 = BUILD (deferred behind j_!).**
  Rebut iter-018 review's "anchor relExt": anchoring `IsLFPAndFlatOn` under 1.10's hypotheses would
  anchor a *restatement of §1 thm 1.10 itself* (proved in AK from exchange 1.8/1.9 + 1.4, NOT cited
  from EGA) — violates the anchor philosophy. Honest close needs relExt real (internal $\sExt$ + $R^q f_*$,
  both absent, internal-$\sExt$ overlaps PAUSED monoidal). Higher-risk than j_!; deferred behind it.
- Final scope: user declined to fix it (iter-001); default = §1 only for now.

## Mathlib gaps & new material
**Structural finding (iter-004/005): opaque stubs gate the deep thms — but the
foundational layer IS buildable.** Conclusions that are `opaque` Props / isos of
`opaque` objects have no constructor, so the gated thms (1.3, 1.9, 1.10 2nd part,
`H`-isos) need each stub made a real def first (mathlib-build), bottom-up.
iter-005 existence-check: Mathlib HAS the foundational pieces (`SheafOfModules`
`.IsFinitePresentation`/`.IsFiniteType`/`.free`; presheaf-monoidal `tensorObj`;
`AlgebraicGeometry.Flat`), so `IsLFP`/`IsFreeMod` are near-direct once the
`X.Modules ↔ SheafOfModules` bridge is confirmed. The relExt/base-change layer
remains genuinely absent.

**Key finding (iter-007) — monoidal reality (corrects old "no MonoidalCategory"
note):** Mathlib HAS `PresheafOfModules.monoidalCategory` (full associators +
unitors) but has NO `MonoidalCategory (SheafOfModules R)` and registers NO
braided/symmetric instance even at the presheaf level. The generic
`CategoryTheory.Sheaf J A` monoidal/braided/symmetric machinery does NOT apply to
modules-over-a-sheaf-of-rings. ⇒ `tensorMod`'s braiding/associator/unitors must
all be hand-built (P1b-i″). Consequence: 1.1.2/1.1.3 (the only §1 lemmas whose
proofs are pure tensor-algebra+Yoneda, no relExt/base-change) are gated on that
scaffolding; every other remaining §1 sorry is gated on a larger absent brick
(real Ext groups, free-presentation, relExt+proper base change).

Gaps to fill:
- **affine bridge — COMPLETE @015** (QCoh(Spec A)≅ModuleCat A). tilde free/exact/counit @012–@013; `fp_sheaf_affine_tilde` @015 via anchor. **Mathlib gap kept open (to build/upstream): affine ess-surj `(tilde.functor R).EssSurj` / `F ≅ ~Γ(F)` for QCoh on affine** (Stacks 01IA) + `~M` fp ⇔ M fp (01PC) — anchored as `External.affine_fp_tilde` after a 3-iter build attempt confirmed it a from-scratch layer absent from Mathlib v4.30.0 (no `EssSurj`/`essImage` for tilde; `IsFinitePresentation`=LOCAL `QuasicoherentData`). Peer projects: all early-stage stubs, NO reusable infra.
- `tensorMod` associator `(A⊗B)⊗C≅A⊗(B⊗C)` (P1b-i″, braiding+unitors DONE): reduces to `sheafifyTensorComparison` `~((~P)⊗Q)≅~(P⊗Q)`, itself reducing to "`tensorObj` preserves local inj/surj" (the one real sub-gap; `toSheafify` local-bij + sheafify-inverts-local-isos are [verified]/standard). ALT route (found iter-008, NOT taken — integration risk): `CategoryTheory.Localization.Monoidal.{Basic,Braided}` would give a full `MonoidalCategory`/`BraidedCategory` on `SheafOfModules` IF one supplies `W.IsMonoidal`+`L.IsLocalization W` for presheaf-mod sheafification (both absent from Mathlib) AND relates the localized tensor to the existing `tensorMod` def (big refactor).
- `j_!` extension-by-zero for SheafOfModules + `Ext^q(j_!𝒪_U,F)=H^q(U,F)` (P1b-ii″, 1.2). `extensionByZero`+
  `extensionByZeroAdjunction`+colimit-pres BUILT @019; `j^*`/`j_!` exactness DONE/reduced @020.
  **Stalk layer NOT absent (found @021):** `Scheme.Modules.toPresheaf`, `restrictStalkNatIso`,
  `germ_restrictStalkNatIso_*`, `restrict_obj` (Mathlib `AlgebraicGeometry.Modules.Sheaf`) + abelian
  `mono_of_stalk_mono`/`stalkFunctor_preserves_mono` (`Topology.Sheaves.Stalks`). Only NEW sub-brick =
  off-U stalk vanishing of `pullback φ`. NOT anchorable.
- **NEXT wall after exactness (Ext-adjunction, 1.2 sub-brick 2):** `Ext^q_X(j_!M,F)≅Ext^q_U(M,j^*F)`.
  `CategoryTheory.Adjunction.derived` EXISTS but @020 found it needs heavy explicit derivability data
  (localizers/derived-functor calculus) absent for these localizations; `Abelian.Ext.mapExactFunctor`
  gives only the MAP. Cleaner hook to seek: "exact left adjoint whose right adjoint preserves injectives
  ⇒ Ext iso" directly on `Abelian.Ext` (j^* preserves injectives since j_! exact). If this is also a wall,
  reassess whether 1.2 is reachable in P1.
- Rearrange `(F⊗f*M)⊗L≅(F⊗L)⊗f*M` (braiding+assoc) + `coyoneda` fully-faithful reflects iso, for 1.1.2/1.1.3. (P1b-ii.)
- 1.4 (@016 assembly + @017 close): `External.descent_noetherian` re-signed to data-descent; `External.tilde_isFP` (fwd 01PC); `External.flat_pullback_exact` (sheaf-level flat pullback SES). @017 residual anchors `External.pullback_isFreeMod`/`pullback_isLFP` = **pullback preserves free / finite presentation** (reduce to `p*𝒪_Y≅𝒪_X` structure-sheaf pullback iso + fp-globalization; absent from Mathlib v4.30.0 — `pullbackObjUnitToUnit` needs `[Opens.map p.base).Final]`; buildable/upstream later). (P1b-ii′, 1.4.)
- Relative Ext sheaf `Ext^q_X(I,F)` of proper f:X→S + its proper base change. (P1b-iii.)

New project material:
- Real defs `IsLFP`,`IsFreeMod`,`IsSFlat`,`tensorMod`,`IsInvertibleMod` (done, P1b-i).
- Real `tensorBaseChangeFunctor` / `tensorBC` / `homTensorFunctor` / `tensorLeft` (done, P1b-i′).
- Hand-built symmetric-monoidal scaffolding for `tensorMod`: `tensorBraiding`, `tensorAssoc`, `tensorLeftUnitor` (P1b-i″).
- `H(I,F)` representing object + universal element `h(I,F)` (done, P1a).
- The base-change map `b^q(M)` for local Ext's (1.8) and exchange (1.9) (P1b-iii).
